# SEO Ustaad - Digital Agency Pakistan

SEO Ustaad is Pakistan's leading digital agency specializing in SEO, AEO, GEO, Local SEO, E-Commerce SEO, Web Development, WordPress Development, and Shopify Development.

## About
- Founded in Pakistan with a mission to make premium digital services accessible to local businesses.
- Serving clients across all 26 major cities of Pakistan.
- Services start from 5,000 PKR and scale based on city tier and package.

## Core Services
- SEO & AEO (Answer Engine Optimization / Generative Engine Optimization)
- Local SEO & Google Business Profile (GMB) Optimization
- E-Commerce SEO for Shopify & WooCommerce stores
- Premium WordPress Development (Theme, Plugin, WooCommerce)
- Custom Shopify Development & White Label Shopify
- Website Speed Optimization & Core Web Vitals
- Technical SEO Audit & Schema Markup
- Social Media Marketing & Meta Ads

## Service Categories
- seo: Search engine optimization services
- ecom: E-commerce SEO and store optimization
- shopify: Shopify store development and theme customization
- wordpress: WordPress development including themes, plugins, and WooCommerce
- web: Custom website development and speed optimization
- smm: Social media marketing and paid advertising

## Pricing
- Entry packages: 5,000 - 15,000 PKR
- Standard packages: 15,000 - 30,000 PKR
- Premium packages: 30,000 - 45,000 PKR

## Target Locations
Karachi, Lahore, Faisalabad, Rawalpindi, Gujranwala, Peshawar, Multan, Hyderabad, Islamabad, Quetta, Bahawalpur, Sargodha, Sialkot, Sukkur, Larkana, Sheikhupura, Rahim Yar Khan, Jhang, Dera Ghazi Khan, Gujrat, Sahiwal, Wah Cantonment, Mardan, Kasur, Okara
